original_prompt: Implement a strict relational mapping that auto-populates and locks required hardware based on ProductTypes selection at creation.
rephrased_goal: Mandatory hardware link on products, snapshot requirements at booking, lock-and-enforce hardware at completion.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Enforce Mandatory Hardware Link in Product Types
subtasks_required: Check existing data for orphaned products
tasks.analogy_reference: every spear-head must have a shaft
tasks.testing_criteria: Product save fails without hardware type selection

tasks.analogy_reference: pull on spear-head to see if stuck
tasks.testing_criteria: Form shows error for missing catalog_id

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Implement Creation-Time Snapshot in Appointments
subtasks_required: Fetch hardware details for selected products
tasks.analogy_reference: draw hunt plan in sand before sun down
tasks.testing_criteria: firebase-blueprint metadata has frozen hardware list

tasks.analogy_reference: look at sand drawing in morning
tasks.testing_criteria: Metadata contains exact hardware types needed

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Lock Hardware Selection in Appointment Details
tasks.analogy_reference: no trade sharp flint for dull stone at cave
tasks.testing_criteria: UI prevents adding hardware not in required list

subtasks_required: Attempt to complete job with wrong hardware
tasks.testing_criteria: Block 'Complete Job' if pair logic skips requirement

subtasks_required: Scan all files for manual hardware overrides
